en: Ah, Ariel, Ariel, the city where David encamped! Add year to year; let the feasts run their round.
zh: 亞利伊勒、亞利伊勒 ， 大衛曾在此安營的城啊，有禍了！ 雖然你一年又一年按時舉行節期，

en: Yet I will distress Ariel, and there shall be moaning and lamentation, and she shall be to me like an Ariel.
zh: 我卻要使亞利伊勒受困苦， 成了一座充滿悲傷哀號的城， 我要以它為亞利伊勒。

en: And I will encamp against you all around, and will besiege you with towers and I will raise siegeworks against you.
zh: 我必四面安營攻擊你， 築起攻城的臺來圍困你， 堆起高壘攻擊你。

en: And you will be brought low; from the earth you shall speak, and from the dust your speech will be bowed down; your voice shall come from the ground like the voice of a ghost, and from the dust your speech shall whisper.
zh: 你必降低， 從地中說話； 你說的話必細微， 如同出於塵土； 你的聲音必像交鬼者的聲音，從地裡出來； 你的言語必像耳語般低微，如同出於塵土。

en: But the multitude of your foreign foes shall be like small dust, and the multitude of the ruthless like passing chaff. And in an instant, suddenly,
zh: 但你敵人的數量必多如灰塵， 那些強暴者的數量也多如被吹散的糠秕， 這必在頃刻之間，突然發生。

en: you will be visited by the LORD of hosts with thunder and with earthquake and great noise, with whirlwind and tempest, and the flame of a devouring fire.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華必用雷轟、地震、大聲、 旋風、暴風和吞滅人的火燄來懲罰他們。

en: And the multitude of all the nations that fight against Ariel, all that fight against her and her stronghold and distress her, shall be like a dream, a vision of the night.
zh: 那時，所有攻擊亞利伊勒的列國眾軍， 就是所有攻擊亞利伊勒和它的堡壘， 以及迫害它的， 必如夢景，如夜間的異象。

en: As when a hungry man dreams he is eating and awakes with his hunger not satisfied, or as when a thirsty man dreams he is drinking and awakes faint, with his thirst not quenched, so shall the multitude of all the nations be that fight against Mount Zion.
zh: 又像飢餓的人在夢中吃飯， 醒了以後，仍然覺得飢餓； 又像口渴的人在夢中喝水， 醒了以後，仍然覺得口渴， 心裡還是想喝。 那攻打錫安山的列國眾軍， 也必這樣。

en: Astonish yourselves and be astonished; blind yourselves and be blind! Be drunk, but not with wine; stagger, but not with strong drink!
zh: 你們留連吧， 自我蒙蔽，繼續盲目吧！ 你們醉了，卻與酒無關， 你們東倒西歪，也不是因為濃酒的緣故。

en: For the LORD has poured out upon you a spirit of deep sleep, and has closed your eyes (the prophets), and covered your heads (the seers).
zh: 因為耶和華把沉睡的靈，傾倒在你們身上； 他緊閉你們的眼，就是先知； 蒙蓋你們的頭，就是先見。

en: And the vision of all this has become to you like the words of a book that is sealed. When men give it to one who can read, saying, "Read this," he says, "I cannot, for it is sealed."
zh: 對你們來說，整個異象就像密封的書卷的話，人把這書卷交給識字的，說：“請念吧！”他必回答：“我不能念，因為它是密封的。”

en: And when they give the book to one who cannot read, saying, "Read this," he says, "I cannot read."
zh: 人又把這書卷交給不識字的人，說：“請念吧！”他必回答：“我不識字。”

en: And the Lord said: "Because this people draw near with their mouth and honor me with their lips, while their hearts are far from me, and their fear of me is a commandment taught by men,
zh: 主說： “因為這子民只用言語來親近我， 用嘴唇尊崇我， 他們的心卻遠離我。 他們對我的敬畏，只是遵從傳統的吩咐。

en: therefore, behold, I will again do wonderful things with this people, with wonder upon wonder; and the wisdom of their wise men shall perish, and the discernment of their discerning men shall be hidden."
zh: 因此，看哪！我要再向這子民施行奇事， 就是奇妙又奇妙的事； 他們智慧人的智慧必要消沒， 他們聰明人的聰明必被隱藏。”

en: Ah, you who hide deep from the LORD your counsel, whose deeds are in the dark, and who say, "Who sees us? Who knows us?"
zh: 那些向耶和華深藏謀略的人，有禍了！ 他們在暗中行事，說： “誰看見我們？誰知道我們？”

en: You turn things upside down! Shall the potter be regarded as the clay, that the thing made should say of its maker, "He did not make me"; or the thing formed say of him who formed it, "He has no understanding"?
zh: 你們顛倒事理了！ 窯匠怎能被看作泥土呢？ 被造的怎能對造它的說：“他沒有造我”？ 製成品怎可對製成它的說：“他不聰明”？

en: Is it not yet a very little while until Lebanon shall be turned into a fruitful field, and the fruitful field shall be regarded as a forest?
zh: 不是還有一點點的時候， 黎巴嫩就要變為肥田， 肥田就要被看為樹林嗎？

en: In that day the deaf shall hear the words of a book, and out of their gloom and darkness the eyes of the blind shall see.
zh: 到那日，聾子必聽見這書卷上的話； 瞎子的眼，必在迷蒙黑暗中也能看見。

en: The meek shall obtain fresh joy in the LORD, and the poor among mankind shall exult in the Holy One of Israel.
zh: 困苦的必因耶和華增添喜樂； 貧窮的人必因以色列的聖者而快樂。

en: For the ruthless shall come to nothing and the scoffer cease, and all who watch to do evil shall be cut off,
zh: 因為強暴人歸於無有，好譏笑人的必被滅絕； 所有意圖行惡的，必被剪除。

en: who by a word make a man out to be an offender, and lay a snare for him who reproves in the gate, and with an empty plea turn aside him who is in the right.
zh: 他們只用一句話就定了人的罪， 又設下網羅來陷害城門口那執行裁判的， 用毫無根據的事屈枉義人。

en: Therefore thus says the LORD, who redeemed Abraham, concerning the house of Jacob: "Jacob shall no more be ashamed, no more shall his face grow pale.
zh: 因此，曾經救贖亞伯拉罕的耶和華，論到雅各家時，這樣說： “雅各今後必不再羞愧，他的面容也不再變為蒼白，

en: For when he sees his children, the work of my hands, in his midst, they will sanctify my name; they will sanctify the Holy One of Jacob and will stand in awe of the God of Israel.
zh: 因為他看見了他的子孫在他中間， 就是我手所作的。 他們必尊我的名為聖， 必尊雅各的聖者為聖， 也必敬畏以色列的 神。

en: And those who go astray in spirit will come to understanding, and those who murmur will accept instruction."
zh: 那些心中迷惑的，必明白真理， 那些發怨言的，必接受教訓。”
